query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.appRole, u.leaderId, l.name as leaderName, a.name as areaName
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id 
LEFT JOIN areas a ON u.areaId = a.id
WHERE u.appRole IN ('leader', 'admin') AND u.status = 'active'
ORDER BY u.appRole, u.name;
command:
